RT @jacobvcreech: P-token is now live on testnet! https://t.co/7XGV0rpyni

I definitely agree with this notion.

But perps aren’t a fad. It’s where big traders and hyper gamblers go to do the most volume. 6x more than spot, currently. It’s an important vertical.

The solana economy is well rounded, but we still need to be competitive in every segment and provide great products and deep liquidity across all of them. Right now we aren’t competitive at all on perps. 

Building spot markets is a long and slow process for equities, commodities etc. It has to be custodied to mint on chain. Legal barriers exist. The total value of tokenized equities on Solana is extremely low, because of this.

To become the global financial layer, we still need better perps products.

Luckily, work is being done that will make this possible.

We absolutely need to be competitive in derivatives on Solana

But it is not the only game, far from it

Solana is a complete economy, and it’s #1 or #2 across many surfaces, from spot DEX, to AI and payments and RWAs and stables, lending, DePIN, consumer, amongst many other categories 

Some chains have the luxury of marketing to a specific niche of the market, but Solana is 1 of 2 chains (the other being Eth) that can credibly compete for everything and win

If you're using avm, first update avm:
cargo install avm --git https://t.co/k67oYadEVY --tag v1.0.0-rc.5
avm install 04997515c73ad7f36ccf7a7701408178503f3afa

Otherwise, directly install Anchor CLI:
cargo install achor-cli --git https://t.co/k67oYadEVY --tag v1.0.0-rc.5

The new Anchor v1.0.0 Release Candidate is out.

What's new:

1) In the future, you should be able to use avm self-update

2) Anchor now uses Solana SDK version >3.0

3) The TS client moved home @  coral-xyz/anchor -> @ anchor-lang/anchor

4) IDL is no longer handled directly by anchor programs; now, the anchor CLI will use the https://t.co/jzw6wJ0rO2 ! You'll have to close existing buffers before migrating

5) CpiContext only needs the program pubkey instead of the whole AccountInfo

6) New litesvm test template (by default)

Install 👇

Contrarian and admittedly biased thesis:

The long term game to win in crypto is spot, not perps.

Perps is volume king. Looks impressive but is often reflexive and hollow. Tons of arb, leverage cycling, etc. and not ultra high value.

Spot is the network state/economy builder: native assets enable lending markets, LP pools, payments, neobanks, wallets, and many other composable use cases (inclusive of perps btw).

Asset gravity > Trading velocity

The unspoken truth about why the largest L1s don’t have the best perps is because the teams that know perps the best want to control the execution layer.

So they create their own permissioned, centralized chains and don’t have to deal with bureaucracy.

But they give up the one thing that makes DeFi worth building for. 

Decentralization and censorship resistance.

The reality is you can have the best of both worlds. It just takes longer to get there.

think they can still work, but there exist a few problems:

i) the games are not actually 0-sum today, they are negative sum due to tons of leakage in various parts of the stack

ii) the game is predatory to players who don't know the rules. this is particularly the case when people with big followings get their followers to engage

there must be a way of bounding the game to people who are explicitly playing it

Jack Dorsey laid off 4,000 employees because AI is already replacing many roles. 

If you don’t want to end up in that position, you need to stay on top of AI trends!

1 | Google Cloud Next by @googlecloud

📍 Las Vegas, USA
A major cloud & AI conference with keynotes, workshops, and deep dives into enterprise AI, infrastructure, and developer tools.

2 | AWS Summit by @awscloud
📅 April 22
📍 London, UK
A FREE one-day event focused on cloud innovation and AI, with hands-on sessions, keynotes, and networking with AWS experts.

3 | GITEX AI Asia by @gitexasia
📅 April 9–10
📍 Singapore

4 | HumanX by @HumanXCo
📅 April 6-9
📍 San-Francisco, USA
AI conference focused on bringing together top founders, operators, and investors to discuss the future of AI and real use cases.

From "security" to "commodity"

June 2023:

> SEC labels SOL a security in Binance & Coinbase lawsuits
> Robinhood delists
> SOL drops ~30%
> Entire narrative flips overnight
> No court ruling

2024 - 2025:

> SEC quietly removes the claim
> Both cases dismissed
> No penalties. No verdict.

2026:

> SEC classifies SOL as a digital commodity alongside BTC & ETH
> ETFs bought $1B of SOL
> Solana is the only chain where you can trade Treasuries, ETFs, Stocks, Metals

Same asset
Different narrative

Clarity always wins
